_comment: Canonical tagger-only semantic-release config, injected by hyperi-ci when a repo has no .releaserc. It carries NO custom releaseRules on purpose: the version bump is semantic-release's OWN default-release-rules (commit-analyzer) -- feat->minor, fix/perf/revert->patch, breaking (! or footer)->major, everything else no release. That default IS the org SSoT; hyperi_ci.release_rules mirrors it in Python for the pre-push gate. semantic-release here ONLY analyses commits + tags HEAD; hyperi-ci's build stamps the version (hyperi-ci stamp-version) and its publish stage creates the GH release / GHCR / registry artefacts. No @semantic-release/exec, no @semantic-release/git, no npm/github defaults. A repo commits its own .releaserc.json ONLY for a genuine exception (e.g. a multi-crate workspace). There is nothing project-specific to edit here.
